scope: anima-audio physical and mathematical limits — 6-cycle ω finding consolidation
approach: completeness frame — weakest evidence link surfaced first

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: discrete 6-emotion design has 67% F0 gap between adjacent labels >> 0.6% pitch JND
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.severity: fundamental — blocks gradient emotion / mixed states
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.remediation: add continuous (V,A,D) ∈ ℝ³ head on top of categorical label

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: 2-pole IIR cascade has no zeros → /m,n,ng,l/ cannot be synthesized correctly
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.severity: phonetic blocker — Korean ㅁ,ㄴ,ㅇ,ㄹ all degraded
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.remediation: add anti-resonance pole-zero pair, or hybrid breath+vocal nasal coupling

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: 1D categorical emotion vs 3D continuous PAD manifold; effective dim mismatch
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.remediation: expose pitch/rate/energy/timbre as continuous controls, not 4 categorical modes

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: LF glottal pulse parameters fixed (T_p=0.45, T_e=0.60) — no voice quality variation
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.remediation: expose T_p, T_e as parameters; add modal/breathy/creaky presets
extend pipe() to 4-formant cascade; complexity O(N_formant × frame)

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: 24 combos cover 37.5% of 4³=64 PAD discretization, missing low-arousal quadrants
Korean aspirated-tense-lax stops require VOT < 80ms timing
no intra-call F0 contour — prosody only at organ-call boundary
Lyra v2 at 3.2 kbps; HEXA at 8 kbps is 2.5× above SOTA neural floor
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.severity: compression headroom — not a defect, capacity expansion opportunity

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.limit: SAMPLE_RATE = J2*1000 has decimal artifact (×1000 not n6-pure)
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.severity: purity audit — claim of 'zero free parameters' weakens at SI unit boundary

strongest_findings.finding: ACTUAL=96ms, theoretical floor ≈ 51ms, P4 target 50ms — within 2% of physical limit; near-optimal causal-AR system
14/14 EXACT in lattice ratios; +1 unstated (Q=6=n) → de facto 15/15
8 kbps at production-codec parity (Opus VoIP), 48× compression = J2·φ EXACT
5/5 cardinal vowels + 8/8 Korean monophthongs covered by 2-formant pipe

track_A_neural_pipeline_changes.change: add 3D PAD continuous head alongside 6-way categorical (rank #1+#3 fix)
stay at 8 stages × 1024; explore reduction to 6×1024 for 6 kbps Lyra-parity
preserve 30ms step (near floor); P4 50ms first packet validated

track_B_organ_changes.change: extend to 4-formant (F1..F4); add Q array per formant (rank #5)
new — pole-zero biquad with anti-resonance (rank #2 fix)
new — F0 contour interpolation within call (rank #8 fix)

falsifiable_predictions_pre_registered.claim: VAD-PAD 3D head reduces emotion confusion matrix off-diagonal by ≥30%
pole-zero pipe_nasal() raises Korean nasal MOS by ≥0.5 vs 2-pole baseline
P4 50ms first_packet preserves G2 e2e ≤ 100ms with no jitter regression

rejected_paths.reason: breaks n6 anchor; PAD-continuous covers gap better
below transparency floor without psychoacoustic model

summary_one_line: anima-audio is at the physical latency floor (96ms ≈ 51ms theoretical floor) and at production-codec parity (8 kbps), with 14/14 n6 lattice EXACT — primary remaining limits are perceptual (1D emotion vs 3D PAD, 2-formant vs 5, no anti-resonance for nasals)
honest_scope_caveat: this is analytic synthesis from code reading + literature priors; no audio synthesis benchmark was run in this cycle (raw#9 hexa-only, $0)
what_was_NOT_validated: real RVQ codebook coverage on speech corpus
